title: HW Asset Detail Dashboard

panels.title: Single asset detail — pick the asset in the target CTE

options.content:
## Single asset detail

This dashboard shows ONE asset, selected via the **Asset** variable (`${object_label}`) in the top bar. Each query's `target` CTE resolves that label to a `device_id` from `raw_business_data.objects`.

Timeseries / pie use the dashboard **time picker** (top-right) — default 24h, switch to 7d/etc. there. Alarm state is shown with a Unicode circle (🔴 shutdown / 🟠 warning / 🟢 ok).

sql.statement: WITH target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), last_pt AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.latitude/1e7 AS lat, tdc.longitude/1e7 AS lon, tdc.device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc JOIN target t ON t.device_id = tdc.device_id WHERE tdc.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND tdc.device_time < NOW() AND tdc.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811) AND tdc.latitude <> 0 AND tdc.longitude <> 0 ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC) SELECT lp.lat, lp.lon, o.object_label, to_char(lp.device_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_seen FROM last_pt lp JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = lp.device_id

WITH params AS (SELECT ARRAY[]::text[] AS shutdown_boolean_labels, 20.0 AS warn_battery_threshold, ARRAY[1,3,5]::int[] AS running_mode_values, 'OPERATING_MODE_LABEL'::text AS mode_sensor_label), target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), last_tdc AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc JOIN target t ON t.device_id=tdc.device_id WHERE tdc.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '25 hours' AND tdc.device_time < NOW() AND tdc.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811) ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), bat AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (lcs.device_id) lcs.device_id, ROUND(lcs.calibrated_volume::numeric,1) AS bat_pct FROM processed_common_data.latest_calibrated_sensors lcs JOIN target t ON t.device_id=lcs.device_id JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON sd.device_id=lcs.device_id AND sd.input_label=lcs.input_label WHERE LOWER(sd.sensor_label) LIKE '%batt%charge%' OR sd.sensor_type IN ('charge','bat_capacity') ORDER BY lcs.device_id, lcs.device_time DESC), shutdown_lbl AS (SELECT lcs.device_id, string_agg(sd.sensor_label, ', ') AS active_labels FROM processed_common_data.latest_calibrated_sensors lcs JOIN target t ON t.device_id=lcs.device_id JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON sd.device_id=lcs.device_id AND sd.input_label=lcs.input_label CROSS JOIN params p WHERE sd.sensor_label = ANY(p.shutdown_boolean_labels) AND lcs.value >= 1 GROUP BY lcs.device_id) SELECT o.object_label, CASE WHEN sl.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN '🔴 shutdown' WHEN b.bat_pct IS NOT NULL AND b.bat_pct < p.warn_battery_threshold THEN '🟠 warning' WHEN lt.device_time IS NULL OR lt.device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN '⚪ offline' ELSE '🟢 ok' END AS alarm_state, COALESCE(sl.active_labels, '—') AS triggering_sensor, COALESCE(b.bat_pct::text || '%','N/A') AS battery, to_char(lt.device_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_seen FROM target t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id=t.device_id CROSS JOIN params p LEFT JOIN last_tdc lt ON lt.device_id=t.device_id LEFT JOIN bat b ON b.device_id=t.device_id LEFT JOIN shutdown_lbl sl ON sl.device_id=t.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE

WITH target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), sens AS (SELECT s.hour_bucket, s.value_max, sd.sensor_label FROM processed_common_data.sensors_data_by_hours s JOIN target t ON t.device_id = s.device_id JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON sd.device_id = s.device_id AND sd.sensor_id = s.sensor_id WHERE s.hour_bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.hour_bucket < NOW() AND sd.sensor_type IN ('temperature','charge','power','rpm','fuel','voltage','instant_consumption','humidity','bat_capacity')) SELECT to_char(hour_bucket, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS device_time_fmt, value_max AS value_max, sensor_label AS sensor_label FROM sens ORDER BY hour_bucket

WITH target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), bool_meta AS (SELECT sd.device_id, sd.sensor_id, sd.sensor_label, COALESCE((sd.parameters->>'bit_index')::int, 0) AS bit_index, COALESCE(sd.parameters->>'calc_method','direct') AS calc_method FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description sd JOIN target t ON t.device_id = sd.device_id WHERE sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL), hourly AS (SELECT s.sensor_id, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket, MAX(CASE WHEN bm.calc_method='bit_index' THEN ((s.value_max::bigint >> bm.bit_index) & 1)::int ELSE CASE WHEN s.value_max >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END) AS is_active FROM processed_common_data.sensors_data_by_hours s JOIN bool_meta bm ON bm.device_id = s.device_id AND bm.sensor_id = s.sensor_id WHERE s.hour_bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND s.hour_bucket < NOW() GROUP BY s.sensor_id, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket) SELECT sensor_label AS sensor_label, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(is_active) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS active_pct FROM hourly GROUP BY sensor_label HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY active_pct DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Boolean state transitions (hourly — when active/inactive, approx.)

sql.statement: WITH target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), bool_meta AS (SELECT sd.device_id, sd.sensor_id, sd.sensor_label, COALESCE((sd.parameters->>'bit_index')::int, 0) AS bit_index, COALESCE(sd.parameters->>'calc_method','direct') AS calc_method FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description sd JOIN target t ON t.device_id = sd.device_id WHERE sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL), hourly AS (SELECT bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket, MAX(CASE WHEN bm.calc_method='bit_index' THEN ((s.value_max::bigint >> bm.bit_index) & 1)::int ELSE CASE WHEN s.value_max >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END) AS is_active FROM processed_common_data.sensors_data_by_hours s JOIN bool_meta bm ON bm.device_id = s.device_id AND bm.sensor_id = s.sensor_id WHERE s.hour_bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND s.hour_bucket < NOW() GROUP BY bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket), changes AS (SELECT sensor_label, hour_bucket, is_active, LAG(is_active) OVER (PARTITION BY sensor_label ORDER BY hour_bucket) AS prev_active FROM hourly) SELECT sensor_label, to_char(hour_bucket,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:00') AS changed_at, CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN '🟢 became active' ELSE '⚪ became inactive' END AS transition FROM changes WHERE prev_active IS NULL OR is_active <> prev_active ORDER BY hour_bucket DESC, sensor_label LIMIT 200

WITH target AS (SELECT device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), ev AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT tdc.device_id, tdc.event_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.latitude/1e7 AS lat, tdc.longitude/1e7 AS lon, tdc.satellites, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tdc.device_id ORDER BY tdc.device_time DESC) AS rn FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc JOIN target t ON t.device_id = tdc.device_id WHERE tdc.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811) AND tdc.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND tdc.device_time < NOW()) SELECT o.object_label, ev.event_id, to_char(ev.device_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS event_time, ROUND(ev.lat::numeric,6) AS latitude, ROUND(ev.lon::numeric,6) AS longitude, ev.satellites, 'https://maps.google.com/?q=' || ev.lat || ',' || ev.lon AS location_link FROM ev JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = ev.device_id WHERE ev.rn <= 20 ORDER BY ev.device_time DESC

list.name: object_label
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT object_label FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY object_label

description: HW Asset Detail dashboard. Shows ONE asset selected via the ${object_label} template variable (Asset dropdown); the target CTE maps the label to a device_id from raw_business_data.objects. Panels: current location (geomap), current alarm state + triggering sensor (Unicode circle), sensor timeseries (hourly via sensors_data_by_hours, controlled by the time picker), boolean active % (7d), boolean state transitions (hourly approximation, like equipment working time), last 20 events. Alarm rules come from the params CTE (shutdown_boolean_labels placeholder, warn_battery_threshold=20). No UI dropdowns/parameters because runtime SQL params raise a syntax error in this Studio version.
